sql.query: SELECT ev.value, ev.name, fa.dateacct, COALESCE(bp.name, fa.description) AS groupbyname, fa.amtacctdr, fa.amtacctcr, (fa.amtacctdr - fa.amtacctcr) AS total, bp.name AS bpname, p.name AS productname FROM fact_acct fa JOIN c_elementvalue ev ON ev.c_elementvalue_id = fa.account_id LEFT JOIN c_bpartner bp ON bp.c_bpartner_id = fa.c_bpartner_id LEFT JOIN m_product p ON p.m_product_id = fa.m_product_id WHERE fa.ad_client_id IN ('__CLIENT_ID__') AND fa.factaccttype NOT IN ('R', 'C') AND ('__DATEFROM__' = '' OR fa.dateacct >= '__DATEFROM__'::date) AND ('__DATETO__' = '' OR fa.dateacct <= '__DATETO__'::date) AND ('__AMTFROM__' = '' OR GREATEST(fa.amtacctdr, fa.amtacctcr) >= '__AMTFROM__'::numeric) AND ('__AMTTO__' = '' OR GREATEST(fa.amtacctdr, fa.amtacctcr) <= '__AMTTO__'::numeric) AND ('__ACCOUNTFROM__' = '' OR ev.value >= '__ACCOUNTFROM__') AND ('__ACCOUNTTO__' = '' OR ev.value <= '__ACCOUNTTO__') AND ('__BPARTNERID__' = '' OR fa.c_bpartner_id = '__BPARTNERID__') AND ('__PRODUCTID__' = '' OR fa.m_product_id = '__PRODUCTID__') AND ('__ORGID__' = '' OR fa.ad_org_id = '__ORGID__') ORDER BY ev.value, ev.name, fa.dateacct
